title: Agent Runtime Guard upfront security contract
description: Schema for horus.contract.json. Validated by runtime/config-validator.js. Hard floors (Section 4.5 of the v2.0 plan) are engine-baked and cannot be relaxed by this document. Version 2 adds optional validity windows, per-branch context trust overrides, and per-tool command allowlists.

validity.description: v2: Optional time-window restrictions. Contract is treated as inactive outside these windows. Engine floors still apply when inactive — this field constrains when contract-allow demotions are honoured, not when the engine runs.

activeHoursUtc.description: UTC hour range (24-h) during which the contract is active. Omit to allow all hours.

activeDays.description: Days of the week (UTC) on which the contract is active. Omit to allow all days.

contextTrust.description: v2: Per-branch trust posture overrides. Entries are evaluated in order; first match wins. Falls back to top-level trustPosture if no entry matches.

branchPattern.description: Glob pattern matched against the current branch name.

outboundDeny.description: Hostname/glob deny list. Empty array allows all outbound — use ['*'] to deny all. Engine outbound floors (critical-risk block, remote-exec gating) are independent of this field and cannot be loosened by any contract value.

allowOnLookupFailure.description: FC #4 (ADR-005): when true, F18 permits this allow entry's host when its PreToolUse DNS lookup fails. Default: false. Per-entry value wins over the top-level scopes.network.allowOnLookupFailure default.

allowDomains.description: F18 (ADR-005): per-contract outbound domain allowlist. Items may be either a plain pattern string or an object { pattern, allowOnLookupFailure? } for per-entry overrides. Default-deny when present and empty. Wildcard support is leading-dot only ('*.github.com' matches subdomains but NOT the bare apex 'github.com'). IP literals are not allowed in this list. Loopback (localhost, 127.0.0.0/8, ::1) is exempt by default. Backwards-compat: F18 enforces only when this field is present; existing contracts without it operate unchanged.

denyDomains.description: F18 (ADR-005): explicit outbound domain deny list. Higher precedence than allowDomains. Same wildcard rules as allowDomains.

dnsCacheSeconds.description: F18 (ADR-005): DNS resolution cache TTL in seconds. Reserved for envelope-bound DNS resolution; not consumed by the v1 sync evaluator. Default: 60.

allowOnLookupFailure.description: F18 (ADR-005) FC #4 default: when true, allow outbound calls when DNS resolution fails for any allow entry that does not set its own per-entry allowOnLookupFailure. Default: false (default-deny on DNS failure).

scanMode.description: Floor: cannot be set to 'off' or any value not in this enum. 'block' hard-blocks class-C secret patterns; 'warn' scans and warns but does not block. The engine's class-C payload floor always blocks regardless of this field — this setting controls the hook-level user-facing behaviour only.

protected.description: Branch name patterns that receive require-review enforcement. Empty array disables contract-level protected-branch configuration. Note: the engine's protected-branch floor (F8) is driven by risk-score.js pattern matching, not by this list — this field is advisory and used for harness-level hints only.

mcp.description: v3: Per-MCP-server policy. Keys are server names (e.g. 'context7'). Values are { policy: 'allow' | 'warn' | 'block' }.

skills.description: v3: Per-skill policy. Keys are skill names (e.g. 'superpowers:writing-plans'). Values are { policy: 'allow' | 'warn' | 'block' }.

session.description: v3: Session-level constraints. maxDurationMin: when exceeded, forces decision to require-review.

maxDurationMin.description: Limit on agent session duration in minutes. When exceeded, decision is forced to require-review with source=session-over-duration; sessionDurationWarning annotation also attached. Operator pattern: 'after N minutes, stop and ask me.'

budget.description: v3: Hard caps on session-scoped quantities. Exceeding either limit blocks via F14 budget-exceeded floor.

tools.description: v2: Per-tool command and path allowlists. Provides finer-grained control than the top-level shell scope.

commandGlobs.description: Glob patterns matched against the command string. Omit to allow all commands for this tool.

pathGlobs.description: Glob patterns matched against the target path. Omit to allow all paths for this tool.
